expectations.text: Uses brave_web_search or web search with site:reddit.com filter
expectations.evidence: No search performed. Relies on general knowledge
No date filter applied. No search executed

expectations.text: Identifies relevant subreddits discussing the topic
expectations.evidence: Lists r/consulting, r/MachineLearning, r/Entrepreneur, r/freelance as relevant

expectations.text: Summarizes sentiment and key discussion themes
expectations.evidence: Provides sentiment ('Generally optimistic but cautious') and 5 discussion themes
No confidence ratings on any findings

eval_feedback.overall: Without skill, agent provides reasonable general analysis but lacks the search methodology and structured output
